title: People in Society Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A person who cleans and takes care of a building.
choices: janitor
carpenter
engineer
rounds.answer: janitor
rounds.explanation: janitor: A person who cleans and takes care of a building.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A person chosen to help make the laws for a country.
choices: janitor
carpenter
senator
rounds.answer: senator
rounds.explanation: senator: A person chosen to help make the laws for a country.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Someone who is brave or helps others.
choices: carpenter
hero
janitor
rounds.answer: hero
rounds.explanation: hero: Someone who is brave or helps others.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A person who builds things from wood.
rounds.answer: carpenter

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A person who helps people understand and follow the law.
rounds.answer: lawyer

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A person who leaves home because it is not safe.
rounds.answer: refugee

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: The janitor keeps our school clean and tidy.
The engineer drew plans for a new bridge.
The senator spoke about new school rules.

games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

choices: The group of people trained to protect a country.

A person who builds things from wood.
rounds.answer: The group of people trained to protect a country.
